items.title: Review and convert or quarantine Building Phishing Reporting Button Workflow before package-facing endorsement, with attention to administrative email-suite configuration, SOAR mailbox monitoring, IOC extraction, external URL/attachment submissions, automated inbox/domain mutation, reporter notification, and private-data surfaces.
acceptance: A done ticket must restore discovery, review a source/skill, normalize a skill, remove a risk blocker, repair catalog parity, publish/verify an installable surface, or kill unsafe/generic material. Status-only updates are not done.
items.stop_line: No publication, package release, external mutation, credential use, private-data ingestion, unsafe endorsement, or unlicensed copying.

items.title: Verify catalog/install-manifest parity after phishing reporting button workflow risk review and record package-facing catalog state without publishing.
acceptance: catalog reflects or reports pending parity for Building Phishing Reporting Button Workflow as security-defensive high requires_review
install manifest remains coherent
no npm publish attempted
evidence: acceptance_result:{"passed":true,"checked_at":"2026-07-09T22:19:08-03:00","evidence":"Catalog surfaces show 1183 skills, security-defensive 72, high-risk 28, unspecified 704; Building Phishing Reporting Button Workflow is package-facing as security-defensive/high/requires_review true; install manifest points to dist/skills and catalog files; no package publication occurred."}
items.stop_line: No publication, package release, external mutation, credential use, private-data ingestion, unsafe endorsement, or unlicensed copying.

items.title: Continue bounded metadata backlog cleanup from the next uncategorized or unspecified-risk package-facing skill; stop immediately and open a risk-review ticket if high-risk executable, credential, SSRF, offensive, account, browser, external-mutation, private-data, or publication-sensitive surfaces are encountered.
acceptance: inspect the next bounded metadata backlog candidate directly from the repository
backfill only safe metadata or stop before unsafe package endorsement
open a concrete risk-review ticket if unsafe surfaces are found
do not publish or perform external connector actions
items.stop_line: No publication, package release, external mutation, credential use, private-data ingestion, unsafe endorsement, or unlicensed copying.

items.title: Review the Remotion and HyperFrames source cluster against existing media and motion skills before any package promotion.
acceptance: record exact source revisions, provenance, and license boundaries
compare candidates with existing media, video, motion, and HyperFrames entries before creating or promoting any slug
preserve imported bodies and distinguish reference, candidate, conditional, superseded, and reviewed lifecycle decisions
run package and catalog validation without publishing
items.stop_line: No publication, package release, external mutation, credential use, private-data ingestion, unsafe endorsement, unlicensed copying, or candidate promotion without review evidence.

items.title: Review OpenSEO and marketing/SEO overlap before adding or promoting package-facing skills.
acceptance: record exact source revisions, provenance, license, and external-service boundaries
compare the source cluster with existing SEO, marketing, browser, analytics, and publishing entries before creating any slug
separate research, audit, implementation, external mutation, credential use, and publication authority
run package and catalog validation without publishing or invoking external services
items.stop_line: No publication, external account mutation, credential use, private-data ingestion, browser automation, remote installer, unsafe endorsement, or unlicensed copying.

items.title: Evaluate the local SEO skills against provider-neutral fixtures before any core promotion.
acceptance: exercise project context, keyword opportunity, page mapping, competitive research, link prospecting, and AI visibility procedures on deterministic local fixtures
verify observed first-party facts, provider estimates, unknowns, and freshness are never collapsed into one evidence class
verify authenticated data, saved keyword state, crawling, contact collection, outreach, page mutation, and publication remain separately gated
record comparative utility and token cost without using live accounts or external services
items.stop_line: Local fixtures only. No authenticated account, paid credit, live crawl, contact collection, outreach, page mutation, report publication, or core promotion.

extensions.purpose: Force skills heartbeats to produce reviewed, installable, discoverable skill value instead of unbounded catalog/status churn.
extensions.selection_rule: Consume the highest-priority dependency-clear ready item allowed by operations/gates.md. If none is eligible, stop cleanly.
